---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea, improvement, or new capability
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use case

What problem are you trying to solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought of and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Links to relevant OSS projects, papers, or prior art. Screenshots or mockups if applicable.
